column2: 2-week pool block for divers prepping a depth trip. Builds CO2 tolerance without burning into the trip itself.

column4: Build CO2 base. Aerobic distance. Easy turn rhythm.
Add CO2 stress. Shorter rests on DYN sets.
column7: Watch for over-reaching. Back off if recovery suffers.

column6: 15 min easy continuous swim with snorkel. Long even strokes.
4x100m DYN @ 2:30 send-off. Aim for relaxed 1:30/100m pace.
CO2 table: 8 holds, max length 1:30, decreasing rest 1:30 to 1:00.
3x50m DYN at moderate pace. Focus glide.
5x75m DYN @ 2:00 send-off. Push the last two.
CO2 table: 8 holds, max length 2:00, rest 1:30 to 0:45.
500m easy swim with fins. No diving.
